description: Pre-registered expectations for Stage 1 derivations. Mismatches are findings. Revised 2026-07-12 after diagnose_01b; original values and reasons for each revision preserved below.

revisions.wrigley_day_games: Original expectation 9442 (from the manuscript draft) FAILED: measured 5,061 day games since 1950. 9,442 matches no definition (all games 8,637; all day games 7,682). Recorded as a probable draft error; Stage 5 reports the definitive matched count and the manuscript sentence will be corrected to it.
revisions.woba_value_nulls: Original expectation of zero nulls FAILED: 99,027 nulls, shown by diagnose_01b to coincide exactly with intentional walks (wOBA excludes IBB). Check replaced with exact-coincidence test; Stage 2 drops IBB rows from the run-value model.
revisions.switch_hitter_check: Original check FAILED because bat_hand is the roster hand, not the per-PA side (Mantle is B on every PA). Stage 1 now derives bat_side: listed side for non-switch hitters, opposite the pitcher's hand for switch hitters. Manuscript wording correction queued: 'the side implied by the opposing pitcher's hand,' not 'the side the batter took.'

notes: Hitter type/quality quartile definitions are deferred to Stage 6 prep; supply the original analysis-board definitions when found. Six park_ids absent from parkcode.txt are recent special venues (BIR01 Rickwood 2024, BST01 Bristol 2025, MEX02, SEO01, SAC01, TAM02) - benign.
